commands.name: standard_verify
commands.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

commands.name: javascript_syntax
commands.command: node -e "extract script tags from app.html and new Function each script"

commands.name: canvas_environment_static_checks
commands.output: No native dialogs or stale recipeGenreInputWrap references. showToast and GAS_URL remain present. Existing executeGAS(payload) call sites unchanged.

commands.name: headless_chrome_genre_picker
commands.command: Playwright with local Google Chrome against file://app.html
commands.output: {"afterSelect":{"value":"[\"和食\",\"中華\"]","open":true},"afterCreate":"[\"和食\",\"中華\",\"発酵\"]","afterBackspace":"[\"和食\",\"中華\"]","closed":true,"errors":[]}
